numbers.heading: By The Numbers
numbers.description: Indonesia is one of the world's most biodiverse and culturally rich destinations, with wonders that few places on Earth can match.

stats.label: Unique species of wildlife found nowhere else on Earth
Islands scattered across the vast archipelago
UNESCO World Heritage Sites to discover

map.heading: Our hills and valleys are like nothing you've seen.
map.description: From ancient volcanic peaks to emerald rice terraces, Indonesia's landscapes offer a beauty that stays with you forever.

photoGallery.heading: Photo Gallery
photoGallery.description: A glimpse into the landscapes, cultures, and fleeting moments that make Indonesia one of the most captivating destinations on Earth.

videoSection.heading: Live a life like you wouldn't imagine, experience a life you wouldn't expect.

cards.title: In The Country
cards.description: Wander through emerald rice terraces, volcanic highlands, and jungle trails where village life unfolds at a pace that reminds you what travel is for.

cards.title: In The City
cards.description: Dive into the energy of Ubud's art markets, Yogyakarta's street food, and Jakarta's rooftop skyline — culture and chaos in perfect balance.

articles.title: The walkways of Indonesia spellbind
articles.description: Discover ancient paths that wind through lush jungles and terraced rice fields, revealing the soul of the archipelago.

articles.title: Perfect beaches exude relaxation and fun
articles.description: From hidden coves to sweeping bays, Indonesia's coastlines offer endless sun-soaked escapes for every traveller.

steps.title: Booking your flights
steps.description: Bali's Ngurah Rai and Jakarta's Soekarno-Hatta connect Indonesia to major hubs worldwide. Booking a few months ahead opens up better fares and more flexibility to hop between islands.

steps.title: Choosing your hotel
steps.description: Indonesia offers everything from clifftop villas in Uluwatu to jungle eco-lodges in Ubud. Think about what experience you want first — the accommodation will follow naturally from there.

steps.title: Planning your experiences
steps.description: Surfing, diving, temple hopping, or simply watching the sun set over the rice fields — know what draws you and build the rest around it.

videoCard.title: Travelling there
videoCard.description: Domestic flights, ferry crossings, and island-hopping boats make getting between destinations part of the adventure itself.

destinations.title: Bali
destinations.description: Island of the Gods — temples, terraces, and turquoise coast.

destinations.title: Raja Ampat
destinations.description: World-class diving in the coral triangle.
